revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]}} }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]}} }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]}} }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]}} }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]}} }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||}} }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag_template_documentation%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag_template_documentation%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||}} }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag_template_documentation%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}}
This template is used to automatically generate documentation for standard [[:Category:Flag templates|flag templates]]. == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{flag template documentation|Country name|ISO|IOC|FIFA}}</syntaxhighlight>
;Parameters :''Country name'' – matches the parameter used with {{tl|flag}} within the flag template itself :''ISO'' – [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code :''IOC'' – [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] :''FIFA'' – [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] If any of the three codes are not applicable for a particular country, leave the respective parameters blank.
This template is placed on the flag template itself (similar to how the {{tl|documentation}} template is placed). This template depends on the mandatory existence of a /doc subpage, which is only used to transclude interwiki links.
===Further usage=== The optional parameter ''header'' is content that goes at the top of the documentation box, above "Description".
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||}} }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
